name: Google Cloud Natural Language
description: Consume Google Cloud Natural Language API

fields.label: Source
fields.description: The source of the document: a string containing the content or a Google Cloud Storage URI

fields.label: Content
fields.description: The content of the input in string format. Cloud audit logging exempt since it is based on user data.

fields.label: Google Cloud Storage URI
fields.description: The Google Cloud Storage URI where the file content is located. This URI must be of the form: gs://bucket_name/object_name. For more details, see reference.

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: documentType, encodingType, language)
